overall.description: A stationary nighttime view from a snow-covered balcony overlooking the futuristic skyline of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. Neon-lit skyscrapers illuminate the dark sky until a flying vehicle cruises across the frame, adding motion to the otherwise static cyberpunk cityscape.

tall thin skyscraper with a pointed spire and blue lighting accents

segments.scene_description: A static view from an elevated snow-covered balcony overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at night. The foreground features a metal railing and snow accumulation, while the background displays illuminated futuristic skyscrapers, including a distinctive domed building and a tall spire, all under a dark clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony overlooking futuristic city skyline

events.description: flying vehicle enters the sky from the right and moves across the frame

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle cruising across the night sky from right to left above the skyline

segments.scene_description: The scene remains largely unchanged with the static cyberpunk cityscape view, but a flying vehicle enters the frame from the right, cruising across the dark sky above the illuminated skyscrapers before exiting to the left, providing the only motion in the otherwise still winter night scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view from a snow-covered balcony that remains still until a single point of motion disrupts the futuristic skyline. It begins with a wide perspective of a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at night, where a metal railing and fresh snow in the foreground frame a horizon of illuminated skyscrapers and a distinctive domed building. As the camera holds this frozen winter scene under a dark, clear sky, the stillness is broken by a flying vehicle entering the frame from the right. The vehicle cruises steadily across the dark expanse above the glowing spires before finally exiting to the left, returning the cityscape to its silent, neon-lit state.
